metrics.bottleneck: Little's Law Violation - WIP of 15 crushing throughput

activity_log.message: Week 25: WIP=15 | Completed=1 | Properties=31 tracked | 6 STEM skills active
Housing: 10 properties scored, 4 action items open
Parents trip: flights booked, insurance + international comms pending
glimpse of might 1.0-alpha1 start — exercise habit active (4 sessions logged)
Dashboard v2.0 — read-only, data-driven from Outliner + STEM skills + property pipeline

skills.name: euclidean-thinking
skills.tags: First-principles reasoning, problem decomposition, and systematic truth-building via Euclid's axiomatic method. Load before decomposing complex problems, constructing arguments, debugging systems, building from scratch, or learning new domains.

skills.name: nightly-momentum-engine
skills.tags: Autonomous weekly synthesis of all LifeOS data through the full STEM stack to produce morning intelligence — trajectory analysis, bottleneck identification, simulated futures, and top actions for maximum compound growth.

skills.name: pilot-dashboard
skills.tags: Read-only modular web dashboard for visual tracking of life metrics, wiki graph, property pipeline, and activity log. No browser input — all updates happen server-side via Hermes cron or scripts. Displays data from JSON state files.

skills.name: probabilistic-thinking
skills.tags: Pre-analysis checklist for decisions involving data, uncertainty, or probability. Load before analyzing data, making forecasts, evaluating claims, or drawing conclusions from samples. Based on Mlodinow's The Drunkard's Walk + Kahneman & Tversky.

skills.name: thinking-in-bets
skills.tags: Decision-making under uncertainty — probabilistic thinking applied to real choices. Load before any high-stakes decision, when evaluating past outcomes, or when forming/defending beliefs. Based on Annie Duke's Thinking in Bets.

skills.name: warp-speed-execution
skills.tags: STEM-grounded frameworks for maximizing execution velocity with guardrails. Load when speed of progress is the priority — career acceleration, skill acquisition, project delivery, life compounding.

bottleneck.why: WIP is at 15 while throughput is 0. Every active task dilutes focus, feeding the 'fix brain first' axiom and blocking forward movement.
bottleneck.unlocked_by: Ruthlessly pruning WIP to 3 forces parallelization into sequential focus, instantly unlocking velocity.

forecast.bear: WIP remains high, 0 viewings completed, properties sell. Physical stagnation continues.
forecast.base: WIP reduced slightly, 1 viewing scheduled, exercise resumes. Slight uptick in momentum.
forecast.bull: WIP slashed to 3, agent contacted today, 2+ viewings completed, momentum returns powerfully.

top_actions.action: Ruthless Pruning — Defer 10-12 tasks immediately. Bring WIP to 3.
top_actions.impact: Massive cognitive offload, allowing throughput to resume.

top_actions.action: Contact Savannah & Kristy — Initiate viewings for Bentonville/Centerton plans.
top_actions.impact: Unlocks housing pipeline, moves properties from tracked to viewed.

top_actions.action: One Physical Reset — Complete a single workout/exercise session today.

momentum_analysis.mantra: Throughput requires sacrifice. Kill the open loops to save the mission.
